title: pseudognaphalium canescens subsp. thermale
intro: Pseudognaphalium canescens subsp. thermale, also known as Hot Springs everlasting, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium canescens subsp. thermale include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
